zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Zouche於大約1276年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯時，她的父親Eudes la Zouche70歲，母親Millicent de Cantilupe32歲。她去世於1350年10月11日在英國諾福爾可英厄姆享年75歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可英厄姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Zouche于大约1276年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯时，她的父亲Eudes la Zouche70岁，母亲Millicent de Cantilupe32岁。她去世于1350年10月11日在英国諾福爾可英厄姆享年75岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可英厄姆。

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Georges, Adrien.
from Old French bosche ‘large bundle of firewood’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a seller of such bundles.

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Zouche was born about 1276, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Eudes la Zouche, was 70 and her mother, Millicent de Cantilupe, was 32. She died on 11 October 1350, in Ingham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Ingham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Zouche est née environ 1276, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Eudes la Zouche, avait 70 ans et sa mère, Millicent de Cantilupe, avait 32 ans. Elle est décédée le 11 octobre 1350, à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Ingham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Zouche um 1276 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eudes la Zouche 70 und ihre Mutter Millicent de Cantilupe 32. Sie starb am 11. Oktober 1350 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Ingham, Norfolk, England und wurde in Ingham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Zouche è nata il circa 1276 nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Eudes la Zouche, aveva 70 anni e sua madre, Millicent de Cantilupe, aveva 32 anni. Morì il 11 ottobre 1350, nel Ingham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolta a Ingham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Zoucheが約1276年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで生まれた時，父Eudes la Zoucheは70歳，母Millicent de Cantilupeは32歳であった。彼女は1350年10月11日にイギリスノーフォルクインガムで75歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクインガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Zouche(이)가 대략 1276년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eudes la Zouche(은)는 70세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Millicent de Cantilupe(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1350년 10월 11일 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 잉함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Zouche nasceu aproximadamente 1276, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Eudes la Zouche, tinha 70 anos e sua mãe, Millicent de Cantilupe, tinha 32 anos. Ela faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1350, em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Zouche родилась около 1276 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Eudes la Zouche было 70 лет, а матери, которую звали Millicent de Cantilupe, 32. Она умерла 11 октября 1350 г. в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности ингхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Zouche nació aproximadamente 1276, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Eudes la Zouche, tenía 70 años y su mamá, Millicent de Cantilupe, tenía 32 años. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1350, en Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Ingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
